app.name: Kombien
app.tagline: Kombien — how long does it take?

modes.ordre_de_grandeur_desc: Pick the right unit of time.

home.title: Kombien
home.subtitle: The duo that estimates how time flies.
home.game_cancelled: Game interrupted before the end of round 1 — no result.

setup.title: New game
setup.end_condition_points_desc: The game stops at the end of the round where a player reaches the target.
setup.end_condition_manual_desc: The game continues round after round, until you decide to stop.
setup.differentiated_questions_desc: Each player gets their own questions, within the same theme.
setup.differentiated_questions_forced: Mandatory: each player already has their own theme.
setup.answer_timer_desc: Past this delay, the answer counts as not given.

errors.pseudo_required: Enter a nickname for every player.
errors.pseudo_same: Every player needs a different nickname.

theme_select.title: Theme selection
theme_select.mode_rotation_desc: Each player picks the next player's category, every round.
theme_select.mode_global_desc: One theme chosen for the whole game.
theme_select.mode_vote_desc: Each player votes for a theme; the most voted one applies to the whole game.
theme_select.mode_multi_desc: Several themes active, questions mix between them.
theme_select.mode_per_player_desc: Each player picks their own theme(s).
theme_select.per_player_hint: Each player picks their own theme(s).
theme_select.vote_intro: Each player votes in turn, without seeing the others' choices.
theme_select.vote_prompt: {{pseudo}}, which theme do you vote for?
theme_select.vote_result_tie: Tie: {{category}} drawn at random among the tied themes.

errors.per_player_min_one: Every player must choose at least one theme.

calibration.intro_body: Before starting, each player answers 5 questions to tune their own "long time" threshold. No points at stake here.
calibration.label: Calibration

question.binaire_prompt: Does it take a long time?
question.ordre_prompt: Which unit best matches this duration?

end.title: Game over
end.submit_error: Could not save the game. Check your connection and try again.

exploits.bullseye_desc: Find the exact unit in Magnitude mode.
exploits.perfect_round_desc: Answer every question of a round correctly.
exploits.on_fire_desc: Reach a streak of 5 correct answers.
exploits.sharpshooter_desc: Win a duel within 10% of the actual duration.
exploits.centurion_desc: Score 100 points in a single game.

contribute.title: Suggest a question
contribute.intro: Your question will be reviewed before entering the game.
contribute.text_fr_placeholder: E.g.: Combien de temps dure un match de tennis ?
contribute.text_en_placeholder: E.g.: How long does a tennis match last?
contribute.success: Thanks! Your question is pending review.
contribute.report_success: Thanks, the report has been recorded.

errors.duration_required: Enter a duration greater than zero.
errors.category_names_required: Enter the new category's French and English names.
errors.unknown_category_needs_names: This category doesn't exist yet: provide its fr/en names to create it.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.

import.title: Question import
import.intro: Upload a CSV, Excel (xlsx) or Markdown file following the provided template. Each row becomes a question pending moderation.

errors.file_too_large: This file exceeds the maximum allowed size.
errors.duration_invalid: Invalid duration (must be a number greater than zero).
errors.unknown_category_needs_names: Unknown category: fr/en names are required to create it.
errors.generic: Something went wrong during the import.

bulk_create.title: Bulk creation
bulk_create.intro: Create a theme and several questions at once. Your draft is saved automatically.
bulk_create.draft_found_body: You have an unfinished bulk creation, saved automatically.

errors.category_names_required: Enter the theme's French and English names.
errors.duration_required: Every question needs a duration greater than zero.

errors.network_error: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown_error: An unexpected error occurred. Try again.
errors.room_not_found: This game doesn't exist or has expired.
errors.room_service_unavailable: The multi-screen service is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
errors.connection_lost: Connection to the game was lost.
errors.not_game_master: Only the game master can do that.

room.home_desc: One main screen, one controller, one device per player.

create.title: Create a game
create.error: Could not create the game. Try again.

lobby.title: Waiting for players
lobby.waiting_master: Waiting for the game master to start the game…
lobby.use_as_main_screen: Use this device as the main screen
lobby.main_screen_hint: Place it on a large screen, before players join: read-only, no answer zone.

master.title: Controller
master.no_spoiler: You'll only see the right answer at the reveal, like every other player.

player.title: Your game
player.waiting_start: Waiting for the game master to start the game…

room.calibration_note: In rooms, Binary mode uses the category threshold (no individual calibration in multi-screen mode yet).

common.quit_game_confirm: Quit now? The current game will not be saved.
common.end_game_confirm: End the game now? If the current round isn't finished by every player, it won't count.
